It empirically documents how data quality issues cascade into downstream model failures, which perfectly frames the motivation for studying non-architectural challenges in deep learning. I will select this paper to be used in the introduction and literature review to summarize existing research on deployment challenges and highlight the critical gap between model-centric research and real-world data engineering practices.
